rationale: Educ. Code §38.251 concerns a mental health resource rubric for schools. It has no operative relationship to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The agency shall develop a rubric for use by regional education service centers in identifying resources related to student mental health that are available to schools in their respective regions.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
